positive: Minimalist abstract watercolor wash of a sprawling mountain landscape at dawn. The composition features dramatic, layered silhouettes of pine trees and jagged peaks against a gradient sky of soft indigo, rose pink, and warm peach. Use a limited, cool-toned palette with high contrast between the dark foreground and the luminous sky. Stylize the image with flowing lines and watercolor bleed effects, making the mountains appear partially submerged in color. Perfect for screen printing or digital fabric print, emphasizing clean edges and strong visual impact. Central composition, vector illustration style, high detail, highly aesthetic, breathable space.
